programmes.show_description: Laura McGhie with your calls and features through the night. Call 08085 909693 (calls are free from mobiles and landlines). Text 85058 (charged at your standard message rate).
Live F1 commentary of Qualifying at the Australian Grand Prix at the Albert Park Circuit in Melbourne.
The big news and sports stories, weather, plus previews of the weekend's sport with Eleanor Oldroyd and Jeanette Kwakye. Text: 85058 (charged at your standard message rate).
Paddy is joined by Mark Simmons, Matt Edmondson and Mollie King. Joe Hicks will be in the '5 Live Lounge' performing your favourite football chants.
Caroline Barker, Jim White, Paul McNamee and Vittorio Angelone join the fight for punditry points whilst discussing the world of sport with guest host Gordon Smart.
Steve Crossman builds up to the day's sporting action plus updates of Mansfield v Arsenal in the FA Cup and England v Iceland in the Women's World Cup qualifiers.
Live rugby union commentary of Scotland v France in the Six Nations.
Steve Crossman with reaction to Scotland v France, the latest scores from the EFL, and build-up to Italy v England in the Six Nations.
Live rugby union commentary of Italy v England in the Six Nations plus updates of Wrexham v Chelsea in the fifth round of the FA Cup from 5:45pm.
Live second half commentary of Wrexham v Chelsea in the 5th round of the FA Cup. Listen to the full match on Sports Extra.
Live football commentary of Newcastle United v Manchester City in the fifth round of the FA Cup.
The day's main news stories, topical debate and interviews. Call 08085 909693 (calls are free from mobiles and landlines). Email: nolan@bbc.co.uk.
Laura McGhie with your calls and features through the night. Call 08085 909693 (calls are free from mobiles and landlines). Text 85058 (charged at your standard message rate).
Live F1 commentary of the 2026 Australian Grand Prix.
Discussion, analysis and the latest news from big fight nights and the world of boxing with Steve Bunce.
John Hunt joins John Murray & Ian Dennis to talk about life as a racing commentator. How does he do it? What are the best commentary positions and quirks of the job?
The big news and sports stories, weather, plus previews of the weekend's sport with Jeanette Kwakye and Steffan Powell. Text: 85058 (charged at your standard message rate).
Colin sets up your day of sport and beyond with a Sunday morning mix of special guests, special conversations and special radio.
Steve Crossman is joined by Nedum Onuoha and Julien Laurens to build-up to the day's FA Cup action, plus reaction to the Australian Grand Prix from earlier today.
Live football commentary of Port Vale v Sunderland in the fifth round of the FA Cup.
Steve Crossman recaps the day's sporting action so far, plus builds up to Leeds v Norwich in the FA Cup.
Live football commentary of Leeds United v Norwich City in the fifth round of the FA Cup.
Your football calls with Robbie Savage and Chris Sutton. Phone 08085 909693 free from mobiles and landlines. Text 85058 at your standard message rate.
Wayne & Franny revisit their early Everton days, Jeffers' Arsenal move & dressing-room tales - including Martin Keown wind-ups and a brutal reserve-game warning from Neil Ruddock.
The Football Daily team review the weekend's FA Cup action.
